architecture_inspirations.name: OpenLineage
architecture_inspirations.takeaway: Model metadata as extensible facets over run/job/dataset-like entities.

architecture_inspirations.name: DataHub/OpenMetadata
architecture_inspirations.takeaway: Treat Data Atlas as catalog/governance/ownership/lineage layer.

architecture_inspirations.name: Great Expectations
architecture_inspirations.takeaway: Turn hygiene rules into explicit expectations/gates.

decision: Classify first. Migrate/passport/delete only through explicit lanes and owner gate.
